ideation: This animation sequence portrays an elderly person's gentle, deliberate movements.  The overall effect is one of calm wisdom and slow, thoughtful actions. Frame 1 starts with a neutral pose, hands slightly forward.  Frame 2 shows one arm slightly raised, as if gesturing in a thoughtful way or perhaps offering a piece of advice. Frame 3 returns to a neutral pose. Frame 4 shows the other arm raised in a similar gesture. Finally, Frame 5 returns to the neutral pose, ending the animation loop.

frames.beat: arms rest forward, a gentle start
the left arm lifts slightly, a thoughtful gesture
the left arm returns to rest
the right arm lifts in a similar thoughtful gesture
both arms settle back into a calm, resting pose
